title: Creamy Chicken Naan Bites
description: A twist on traditional Indian street food, these bite-sized naan bites are filled with melted cheese, chicken, and cream, perfect for a quick snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together cream, melted cheese, and shredded chicken.
Add minced garlic and lemon zest to the bowl and mix well.
Cut naan pieces in half and place on a baking sheet.
Spoon about 1 tablespoon of the cream and cheese mixture onto each naan half.
Bake in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
